content_of_post_to_answer: How does the school support students' mental and emotional health?
answer: Schools support mental and emotional health best when they create systems where students feel safe being honest, not just programs that react after a crisis. A counselor, a trusted teacher, and a culture that notices small changes can matter more than a one-time workshop. I've explored this connection between environment and emotional wellbeing in more detail on my profile, if you'd like to read further. A healthy school is not one without struggles; it is one where students don't have to hide them.
